form.formComment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at Gawler over 400m in 23.16 last start, beating Oscar Intention. Must be a winning chance again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at Gawler over 400m in 23.16 last start, beating Oscar Intention. Must be a winning chance again.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (26.72) when sixth over 460m at Geelong in a Grade 4/5. Yet to miss the placings in six runs from this box, including three wins. Looks suited here and rates a leading chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked turning out of front straight.

form.formComment: Good win last start as odds-on favourite by 1.5 lengths over 530m at this track in a handy 30.58, beating Slick Angel. Has hit winning form and can go on with it.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good win last start as odds-on favourite by 1.5 lengths over 530m at this track in a handy 30.58, beating Slick Angel. Has hit winning form and can go on with it.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (20.14) when fifth over 342m at this track in a Grade 5. Has five placings from eight starts from the draw. Tough field and looking to others this time.

form.formComment: Facing tougher opposition than she has faced recent starts and current form just not to what is required to figure. Not going well enough to figure in this.

form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage fourth last time out over 530m at this track. Others hold stronger claims.

form.formComment: Ended last campaign with a eighth (30.87) in a GR 5 at Wentworth Park and returns after a three months break. Will need some luck to feature.

form.formComment: Good win last start as odds-on favourite by 0.8 lengths over 512m at Mt Gambier in a handy 29.48, beating Crocodile Roll. Yet to be beaten in two starts out of this box. Sure to go well.
